subject: How to stop voter suppression from re-electing Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|

| | Peter, In 2016, millions of Democrats stayed home or were intimidated from voting at all, and Donald Trump won Wisconsin by just 0.77%, Michigan by just 0.23%, and Pennsylvania by just 0.72%. But if Democrats fail to show up to vote in 2020, Trump will win again, we'll lose our House majority, and Mitch McConnell will maintain control of the Senate. If Trump wins re-election after surviving impeachment, he'll grow increasingly unhinged. Kids in cages, the Muslim Ban, tax cuts for the wealthy and big corporations, withdrawal from the Paris climate accords, calling white supremacists "very fine people," and calling his impeachment a "lynching." That all will look tame. Trump will stack the Supreme Court with more lifetime appointments, more justices like Brett Kavanaugh. Trump will gut the EPA. He'll destroy Obamacare and defund Medicare and Social Security in favor of more and more tax cuts for the wealthy and big corporations. Our mission at When Democrats Turn Out is to prevent a repeat of the 2016 election by educating voters in key swing states. Our mission is to support every single key Senate battleground race and dozens of House candidates. Our mission is to beat Trump in 2020. But right now, we're falling VERY short of our fundraising goals. If we can't raise another $2,300 today, we'll need to significantly scale back our strategy in 2020. We do not accept corporate contributions or contributions from Big Oil, Big Banks, or Big Pharma. Our work is 100% funded by thousands of grassroots supporters across the country. Our work is funded by you. clean_body: | I just got off the stage, and it’s official, folks: I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Kentucky to defeat Mitch McConnell. ****=** This announcement is a bold statement of our faith as Kentuckians and Americans. It is a declaration that we understand that nothing will change unless we stand together and lead for it. It gives me hope to hear voices from across Kentucky, who have been ignored for so long, speak up and say they are ready to fight back. This movement is proof that your voice matters, even if you’re a young black man from one of the poorest parts of Kentucky. Growing up, my family suffered from poverty, but we were never poor in spirit. I never doubted my family or the success we were capable of, even when we had to skip meals to survive. I never doubted Kentucky, either. Mitch McConnell was elected to the U.S. Senate the same year I was born. Kentucky has been suffering from his corruption and greed literally my entire life. subject: Blown away by what I’m seeing in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Iowa is cold, but our campaign is red hot!

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5545%2E377263%2EKdrBPq) Yang Gang --

Greetings from Iowa! I am in between campaign events right now and using this rare breather to reflect on how far we’ve come.

I know it sounds cheesy (what else would you expect from a dad joke expert?) but I can’t help but wish that every single member of the Yang Gang were here with me in Iowa to see everything our campaign is accomplishing day in and day out.

Because of your support, we now have over 15 field offices throughout the state -- places where thousands of staff and volunteers gather before going out to knock on doors in the freezing cold to have conversations with voters.

**[We need your help to keep this pace going for another 29 days! So please chip in $5 or more now to ensure we can reach enough voters in Iowa to win on Election Day.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21261?t=5&akid=5545%2E377263%2EKdrBPq)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21261?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5545%2E377263%2EKdrBPq)

It gives me the energy I need to talk to voters for 12 hours a day, interact with thousands of members of the Yang Gang, and go on national television to spread our important Humanity First vision. I love all of it, and it’s nice to know that you have my back.

To Iowa and beyond!

-Andrew

**This Year:** Kansas has an open Senate seat, **_and polling shows that Democrats have a lead on Republican front runner Kris Kobach (who 's running AGAIN despite losing in 2018)._**

**Now:** 314 is endorsing Democrat Dr. Barbara Bollier for Senate in Kansas because we know she's our best shot to flip this Senate seat.

**[Chip in $10 now to help flip a Senate seat in Kansas>>](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-janfr?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in+ask+now+to+help+flip+a+Senate+se&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_90DO_200105_1_1&source=314_EM_FR_90DO_200105_1_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_90DO_200105_1_1")** | | [Chip in Now](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-janfr?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+Now&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_90DO_200105_1_1&source=314_EM_FR_90DO_200105_1_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_90DO_200105_1_1")

* * *
For the first time since 1932, we have a real shot at flipping a Senate seat in Kansas.

Dr. Bollier is a physician who has dedicated her life to helping people. _If elected, Dr. Bollier would be the first female doctor elected to the U.S. Senate._

She understands the importance of affordable healthcare and will not hesitate to take action on our climate crisis.

**But Dr. Bollier needs your help.**

Kris Kobach is raising money hand over fist from dark money Repbublican donors who want to see his sinister voting laws enforced at a national level. Remember, Kobach ran Trump's fake voter fraud commission aimed at restricting citizens' ability to vote.

We can't afford to see his policies enacted at a national level.

**[So we're trying to give the doctor a boost. We need to raise $10,000 in 24 hours to boost Dr. Bollier's chance of flipping Kansas blue! Can you chip in $10 right now?](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-janfr?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+So+wersquore+trying+to+give+the+doctor+a&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_90DO_200105_1_1&source=314_EM_FR_90DO_200105_1_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_90DO_200105_1_1")**

| Hi,
I wanted to make sure you'd seen my [new op-ed](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Rgc1tcRef3RGKpUVB3zNvgHayD34d9UIn5f_7YulQy9skr59v9UTlyK-TSTYrEBRw5lMOMjxwwbANpuxlqk69_ltOL9-3yZoipReF5KvC4eIPPkwrBsXV709DM3iX4MJ8ULmJ4NIwy9dR6Oj0zbO9yRP2pLrgAD3CAcdp6E9h01PCB5Qyj_M88f9F6ldE7xIGEcboFdcSPAllusZ6lZW4Q==&c=I606kB5i49seYtWxoOePcIyig3OSsGy_UoqqG4r1wf4hIzE4JQaMLw==&ch=1TW2M03tKsQAi3b9sBAJU7hNNI4nN_B5iXNwZBrVxSDfOibUwjYTrQ==) about President Trump's bold and decisive move to take out Iranian General Qasem Soleimani. This man was a terrorist with the blood of hundreds of Americans on his hands.
America is safer with him gone, as is the entire world.
Furthermore, this move again shows that under President Trump, we now live in an era of action.
We now live in an era in which rogue regimes will be held accountable for escalating tensions and propping up terror networks.
We live in an era in which attacking Americans come with serious consequences.
[Click here to read the full op-ed.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Rgc1tcRef3RGKpUVB3zNvgHayD34d9UIn5f_7YulQy9skr59v9UTlyK-TSTYrEBRw5lMOMjxwwbANpuxlqk69_ltOL9-3yZoipReF5KvC4eIPPkwrBsXV709DM3iX4MJ8ULmJ4NIwy9dR6Oj0zbO9yRP2pLrgAD3CAcdp6E9h01PCB5Qyj_M88f9F6ldE7xIGEcboFdcSPAllusZ6lZW4Q==&c=I606kB5i49seYtWxoOePcIyig3OSsGy_UoqqG4r1wf4hIzE4JQaMLw==&ch=1TW2M03tKsQAi3b9sBAJU7hNNI4nN_B5iXNwZBrVxSDfOibUwjYTrQ==) I hope you'll read it, then share it with your family and friends.
Thank you, Dr. Roger Marshall

body:

| | |
---
|
# **LAST WEEK WITH ROB**

Hello Friends,

Welcome back for another “Last Week with Rob.” I hope you all had a wonderful holiday season and were able to spend quality time with close friends and loved ones. This past week, I’ve been able to make it around NY-27, from visiting with a wonderful organization down in East Aurora to touring an exciting new project up in Wilson. We also had some major developments take place in the Middle East, which has left many asking “what happens next?”

---
|
---
### Lothlorien Therapeutic Riding Center
I was able to join Assemblyman David DiPietro and the good folks down at Lothlorien Therapeutic Riding Center in East Aurora. During my visit, we discussed the center’s new partnership with People, Inc. and the therapeutic benefits that riding horses have for those with mental and physical disabilities. The center has also done a wonderful job reaching out and working with local veterans’ organizations to help provide therapeutic riding for our veterans struggling with post-traumatic stress.
|
---
### Wilson Community Library
Up in Wilson, I spent time with Mayor, Art Lawson and Wilson Community Library Director, Melissa Langridge where I was able to see first-hand the transformation taking place at the library. I am proud to have assisted in securing vital funding that will help create an important community resource and will serve as an educational center for all residents of Wilson.
|
### NYS Farm Bureau "Circle of Friends"
In case you missed it, I was recently named to the New York Farm Bureau’s “Circle of Friends.” Agriculture is the number one economic driver of Western and Upstate New York, and it’s critical that legislators enact policies aimed at assisting our farming community as they compete globally. I will continue to be a strong ally and a good friend to those in our state’s agriculture industry.
---
|
---
|
### U.S. Airstrike on Qassem Soleimani
Finally, on Thursday, President Trump authorized an airstrike on Iranian military personnel, killing Qassem Soleimani. Soleimani and the Iranian Revolutionary Guard Quds Force has long been a terrorist organization. They are directly responsible for hundreds of U.S. servicemember deaths in Iraq. Iran’s goal has always been to destabilize Iraq and our allies in the Middle East. This strike eliminates one of the masterminds of those efforts. As a combat veteran, I strongly believe we must always exercise great caution when it comes to using military force, but we must also respond to attacks that endanger American lives in a swift and forceful manner. We must be able to protect our military and our citizens.
---
| As always, feel free to stay up to date on my campaign by following me on facebook and twitter at @RobOrttforCongress and let me know what’s going on in your community and your life. Thank you and God Bless.

Rob
Battle-tested Patriot

name: Gary Peters
subject: Please add your name now to demand Congress protect affordable health care.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
More than 20 million Americans gained health insurance when the Affordable Care Act was signed into law nearly a decade ago.
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da95c/5721a3ed/7040978e/efb4f68/3192338096/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friends,
More than 20 million Americans gained health insurance when the Affordable Care Act was signed into law nearly a decade ago. But for the first time since the law's passage, new government figures show that the number of uninsured Americans is on the rise.

In fact, compared to 2017, there were two million more Americans who lacked health insurance in 2018 - and while it's an outrage, it's not exactly shocking. Donald Trump is actively supporting a lawsuit that could end the ACA for good. The Trump administration has encouraged states to make it more difficult for people to prove they're eligible for Medicaid.

Millions of Americans and Michiganders benefit from the ACA - whether it's through the health insurance they get or by being protected from discrimination based on a preexisting condition. That's why I'm fighting any and all Republican attempts to weaken or dismantle the law.
I'm looking for 10,000 folks to sign on to make your voice heard: [**_Please sign this petition to demand Congress protect affordable health care. The number of insured in this country should be going up, not down. clean_body: More than 20 million Americans gained health insurance when the Affordable Care Act was signed into law nearly a decade ago. | | | "" Friends, More than 20 million Americans gained health insurance when the Affordable Care Act was signed into law nearly a decade ago. But for the first time since the law's passage, new government figures show that the number of uninsured Americans is on the rise. In fact, compared to 2017, there were two million more Americans who lacked health insurance in 2018 - and while it's an outrage, it's not exactly shocking. Millions of Americans and Michiganders benefit from the ACA - whether it's through the health insurance they get or by being protected from discrimination based on a preexisting condition. Hello

Happy New Year! 2020 is already shaping up to be a fantastic year with a record high stock market, record low unemployment, and record number of conservative justices on the bench.

In November, I'm looking forward to taking back control of the House from Democrats fixated on impeachment and undermining our nation's foreign policy strength.

But none of that will be possible if we lose this congressional seat. The path to a new Republican majority runs right through the Fourth District and Nancy Pelosi is hoping her hand-picked candidate will coast to victory.

For the sake of our children and future generations, we MUST win in November.

But we can't just elect any politician with an R next to their name. Would a President Jeb Bush or any other career politician be getting as much done and pushing as hard for our values as President Trump?

Definitely not. President Trump has proven what can be done when we elect people who care more about our country than a career. In 2016, Republicans controlled the House, the Senate, and the White House but we had too many establishment candidates that got nothing done.

No wall. No Obamacare replacement. No serious end to abortion. The swamp remained the swamp.

It's why we need your help to nominate an Iowan from outside the political establishment to win this seat. An Iowan who has spent his life serving his neighbors and living out conservative values in his community.

And with your help, we will do this. Your can help us reach more people by sharing our Facebook page, but you can also help us reach 1000 people on Facebook by contributing just $10.

Just $10 helps our cause that much.

Please consider donating $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can this month (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=5290b46c8c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-5290b46c8c-25822489) to send a problem-solver -- someone like your neighbor -- to Congress to serve the everyday Iowan.
DONATE $10 TODAY (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=5290b46c8c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-5290b46c8c-25822489)
DONATE $25 TODAY (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=5290b46c8c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-5290b46c8c-25822489)
DONATE $50 TODAY (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=5290b46c8c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-5290b46c8c-25822489)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Please read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together in the new year.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,

P.S. Only 148 days until the primary on June 2nd. We need your support (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=5290b46c8c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-5290b46c8c-25822489) today.
RECENT COVERAGE

https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-visits-kdcr-in-sioux-center/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=5290b46c8c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_24_05_11_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-5290b46c8c-25822489

"President Trump's on the right track on trade. We do have to have a little patience and it'd be nice if the rest of the government (Democrats) would support him on this. That would make our front more unified.”
UP NEXT
